title: Mistral - Hugging Face - EF Hack Paris - Encrypted ML Pipeline
description: Developed a fully automated pipeline for converting ML models to an end-to-end encrypted equivalent using Zama and homomorphic encryption, securing 3rd place at the LLM Hack in Paris/Saclay.

title: Sybil - Cancer Prediction Model
description: Currently working at CSAIL on Sybil, a machine learning model that uses computer vision on low-dose CT scans to predict future cancers up to 5 years in advance.

title: Javions
description: This is my biggest project yet: It is an ADS-B messages decoder and visualizer. It is a work in progress and will be released soon. (Java)

title: Logisim lab session (logic counter)
description: This is my tp3/4 from the DSD course as a first year EPFL cs student. It is a logic counter made in Logisim-Evolution.

title: Rogue-like game
description: RoguEPFL is a video game made as a first semester student project. It is a small game with intent to play a randomly generated map.

title: PixelPerfect QOI
description: Pixel perfect is a tool to convert png to QOI image file format (more efficient) back and forth.

title: Numerical methods cheatsheet
description: This is a cheat sheet to solve linear systems and do polynomial regression in python.

title: VHDL cheatsheet
description: This is a small vhdl cheatsheet made for the DSD course in first year at EPFL
